headline: Digital Agriculture Platform Covers 120,000 Farmers
context: Government MyAgro digital platform serves 120,000 Malaysian farmers with market access weather data and input pricing.

cards.big: MyAgro platform serves 120,000 farmers with market and weather data
cards.sub: Digital agriculture programme launched in 2023 targets 500,000 users by 2028

cards.big: Farmers using platform reported 18% higher crop prices from direct market access
cards.sub: Average income increase of RM450 monthly for active platform users

cards.big: Only 28% of Malaysian farmers have smartphones capable of running the app
cards.sub: Rural connectivity gaps prevent 180,000 additional farmers from accessing

cards.big: Platform available in Malay only excluding indigenous language communities
cards.sub: RM45 million annual operating cost funded by Agriculture Ministry

cards.big: Digital agriculture tests whether technology platforms can serve farmers beyond the already connected
120,000 farmers on digital agriculture platform. Technology adoption in farming succeeds with extension support, not just apps.
